policy_bindings.merge_governance: Topology evidence may invalidate or block merge but never authorize merge.
policy_bindings.runtime_governance: Topology evidence may invalidate runtime legitimacy but never authorize execution.
policy_bindings.sovereignty_governance: Topology evidence may classify sovereignty containment drift but never create sovereignty authority.
policy_bindings.containment_governance: Topology evidence may require containment and fail closed on ambiguity.

core_invariant: If no valid topology object exists, reconciliation legitimacy is NULL.
